detailed_description.heading: Touchscreen VoIP Terminal
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi G3 Touch Wall is a next generation wall mounted communication device designed to bring modern telephony and smart interaction into professional and residential environments. Built for seamless integration with the UniFi Talk platform, it functions as a dedicated communication hub, combining intuitive controls with a clean and compact design. The device features a 7 inch multi touch display with a resolution of 1280 x 800, delivering clear visuals and responsive interaction. The anti glare screen treatment ensures comfortable visibility in different lighting conditions, making it suitable for continuous daily use. Its wall mount design allows for efficient space utilization while providing easy access to core communication features.

detailed_description.heading: Ecosystem Integration
detailed_description.text: Designed as part of the UniFi ecosystem, the G3 Touch Wall supports UniFi Talk and Talk Relay, enabling smooth call handling and communication management across connected devices. The interface is optimized for simplicity, allowing users to access key functions quickly without unnecessary complexity. With its integrated camera and modern design, the device extends beyond traditional desk phones by offering enhanced interaction capabilities. It is well suited for offices, hospitality environments, and smart homes where a reliable and visually integrated communication solution is required.

detailed_description.heading: Connectivity and Interaction
detailed_description.text: The UniFi G3 Touch Wall is equipped with a wide range of connectivity and interaction technologies designed to enhance usability and flexibility. It includes two Gigabit Ethernet ports, enabling stable wired network connections and easy integration into existing infrastructure. In addition, support for WiFi standards up to 802.11ac provides reliable wireless connectivity when needed. Bluetooth functionality adds further versatility, supporting both general use through Bluetooth 4.2 and compatibility with the Ubiquiti G3 Wireless Handset via Bluetooth 5.2. This allows users to extend communication capabilities with additional accessories, improving convenience and mobility within the workspace.

detailed_description.heading: Additional Features & Audio
detailed_description.text: The device also includes NFC support, enabling quick and secure interactions such as authentication or device pairing. With support for multiple NFC standards and a read range of less than 10 mm, it provides reliable short range communication for compatible applications. Audio performance is optimized for clear communication, featuring dual omnidirectional microphones and dual 3W speakers for hands free operation. The system ensures that both voice input and output are clear and consistent, even in active environments. Together, these connectivity and interaction features make the G3 Touch Wall a versatile communication platform.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Hardware Design
detailed_description.text: The UniFi G3 Touch Wall is built on a reliable hardware platform designed for stable and efficient operation. It is powered by an octa core ARM Cortex A53 processor, supported by 2 GB of RAM and 32 GB of internal storage. This configuration ensures smooth performance across communication and system functions, even during continuous use. The device supports both USB Type C and Power over Ethernet as power methods, offering flexible installation options depending on the environment. With a maximum power consumption of 11W, it maintains energy efficient operation while delivering consistent performance. Constructed from polycarbonate with an aluminum alloy base, the enclosure provides durability while maintaining a modern and professional appearance. The device weighs 1.1 kg, offering a solid and stable wall mounted installation. A built in mute button and multi color LED indicators provide simple control and status feedback for everyday use. The integrated 5 MP camera includes a privacy shutter, ensuring user control over video functionality. Designed to operate within a temperature range of 0 to 40° C and humidity levels from 10 to 90% noncondensing, the device is suitable for a wide range of indoor environments. Overall, it delivers a balanced combination of performance, reliability, and modern design.
